claim_boundary: Active-campaign open computational Docking geometry snapshot only; not terminal teacher, binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or formal validation.

inclusion_contract.paired_seed_rule: The same integer seed must have successful 8x6b and 9e6y jobs for a candidate.
inclusion_contract.candidate_aggregation: For each receptor take the median only over the same paired-successful seed set; derive R_dual_min as exact min(R_8X6B,R_9E6Y).

split_contract.frozen_test: May be counted only. Candidate identifiers, sequences, per-job scores and candidate-level labels must not be emitted.

lineage_contract: sequence_sha256 must equal SHA256(sequence) and be unique
model_split must be train, development, or frozen_test
job entity, sequence hash, conformation, seed, job hash and protocol core must match the frozen manifest and result
